mapper.sql: id, biz_type, biz_id, category, level, group_id, group_name, task_id, task_status, title, content_summary, payload_json, source_time, created_time
mapper.delete: DELETE n FROM ea_in_app_notification n LEFT JOIN ea_in_app_notification_recipient r ON r.notification_id = n.id WHERE r.notification_id IS NULL AND n.created_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionDays} DAY)
